model.note: Primary case maps UNI volume to Binance spot denominator × UNI/Binance spot share, sampled from 2022-present; blended 70% MS30/MS180 + 30% MS7/MS30 velocity decays over 12M; 25% LP fee switch + 0.30bps frontend fee; Y3 effective supply includes observed reserved-supply release.

current_gp.binance_spot_proxy_method: BTCUSDT spot quote volume scaled by Blockworks annual Binance spot totals

secondary_chart.label: Historical Mcap / GP (full activation)
secondary_chart.subtitle: Market cap ÷ annualised full-activation GP
secondary_chart.note: Rolling 30D volume with no-lookahead fee rule: min(rolling 30D LP fee bps, trailing 12M LP fee bps). Full activation = 25% LP fees + 0.30bps frontend.

model.note: Card GP = GDV × 135bps take × margin; staking GP = ETH bootstrap; vault flat; net profit accumulates to treasury cash

secondary_chart.label: Historical Mcap / GP (TVL-anchored proxy)
secondary_chart.subtitle: Market cap ÷ TVL × current GP/TVL rate
secondary_chart.note: TVL-anchored GP proxy; card business growth is not captured historically.

data.name: Jupiter

model.note: Perps = Binance Futures volume × JUP/Binance perps share × clean take-rate; spot = Binance spot volume × JUP/Binance spot share × rake. 50% of modeled GP used for buybacks; 0 scheduled unlocks until Jupiter announces reserve plan.

current_gp.perps_volume_source: fallback: JUP Perps clean GP / 1.50bps clean take-rate
current_gp.binance_futures_proxy_method: BTCUSDT futures quote volume scaled by Blockworks annual Binance Futures totals
current_gp.binance_spot_proxy_method: BTCUSDT spot quote volume scaled by Blockworks annual Binance spot totals

caveats: JUP Perps direct DefiLlama derivatives volume is not available from the public summary endpoint in this environment; perps numerator falls back to clean-GP-implied volume unless a live dailyVolume series is returned.
Jupiter aggregator volume falls back to fee-implied volume if the public DEX summary endpoint does not expose dailyVolume for the aggregator slug.

secondary_chart.label: Historical perps GP buyback horizon
secondary_chart.subtitle: Years to buy circ supply at 50% of annualised perps GP
secondary_chart.note: Uses trailing 30D JUP Perps fees × 25% take × 50% buyback share. Perps GP only; spot GP excluded.

data.name: Hyperliquid

model.note: HL vol × Binance market share × 0.026% clean treasury take-rate + USDC yield; MS30/MS90 momentum decays over 12 months; 4 supply/emission scenarios

mcp_bullets: Protocol fee revenue accelerated versus the 180D annualised run rate.
Hyperliquid Perps ranked #1 by 30D derivatives volume in the DefiLlama derivatives category snapshot.
30D market share (16.6%) is running 21% above the 180D baseline (13.7%), signalling momentum acceleration.
Rolling 30D/Binance share grew 5.1pp over the last 90D window (current MS30 16.6%).
At spot, fee-only buyback horizon is 31.6Y (trailing 30D annualised revenue / target supply at spot price).
caveats: Market share (MS90) from DefiLlama MCP derivatives volume vs scaled Binance BTCUSDT proxy.
USDC yield modeled separately from perp revenue; TVL follows HL volume path via estimated elasticity.
Supply scenarios range from DB-observed emissions (~1M/mo) to worst-case non-circulating overhang release.

data.name: Lighter

model.note: Lighter perps volume is anchored to Binance Futures market share, using MS90 as the starting valuation seed; holder revenue funds 100% buybacks; fixed post-cliff supply unlocks are included per path. Stablecoin yield is shown as a sensitivity, not confirmed current Lighter treasury revenue.

market_share_velocity.note: 7D/30D unavailable in imported Lighter artifact; score uses capped 30D/180D until live daily history is added.

caveats: Lighter paid derivatives history is short; historical diagnostics use daily price and trailing 30D revenue where available.
Market-share trend uses rolling-window snapshots (30D/90D/180D) against Binance Futures, not a full daily share history.
Stablecoin yield is a sensitivity copied from the HYPE framework and should be treated as optional future business, not current Lighter protocol revenue.
P90 and chart distribution are approximated from MC P25/P50/P75 because the imported Lighter run exported quartiles rather than the full terminal distribution.
Two-year +/-30% probabilities are approximated from exported PV quantiles because the imported Lighter artifact did not include path-level M24 samples.

secondary_chart.label: Historical buyback horizon
secondary_chart.subtitle: Market cap divided by trailing 30D holder revenue annualized
secondary_chart.note: Supply-adjusted MC buyback years are shown in the snapshot table; this historical chart uses observed market cap and trailing holder revenue only.

mcp_bullets: 30D paid perps volume: $44.4B, equal to 3.05% of the Binance Futures proxy.
Trailing 30D revenue annualizes to $33.7M; holder revenue capture is 97.6%.
Primary P50 PV uses holder revenue plus HYPE-style TVL yield sensitivity and fixed token unlock schedule through month 36.

data.name: Sky

model.note: GP = gross income - savings-rate cost - stUSDS expense. NP = GP - OPEX. HYPE-style path: sampled historical monthly money-market/yield-vault TVL denominator × sampled monthly shocks × Sky MS90 share seed; 70% MS30/MS180 + 30% MS7/MS30 velocity ensemble decays over 12M; DAI supply flat and USDS fills the remainder. Money-market returns are dampened 0.65 and capped -8%/+10% monthly. Treasury = cumulative positive NP. Protocol financial rates locked 2026-05-08.

mc_path.start_money_market_tvl_rule: uniform random draw from historical monthly money-market/yield-vault TVL
mc_path.rule: sample starting money-market/yield-vault TVL uniformly from historical monthly denominators; sample monthly denominator shocks; apply Sky MS90 share seed; 70% MS30/MS180 + 30% MS7/MS30 velocity ensemble decays over 12M; DAI stays flat and USDS fills the remainder

caveats: USDS/DAI supply is sourced from Sky's official supply page API; financial rates and savings/stUSDS assumptions remain locked at the prior run.
USDS path now follows broad money-market/yield-vault TVL denominator × Sky share, not DefiLlama stablecoin market share.
No buybacks or SKY supply reduction modeled; treasury accumulates cash only.
Take-rate assumptions are stablecoin economics rates on modeled Sky supply: gross income yield, savings cost, stUSDS cost, and net GP spread.
Savings rate (3.65%) and USDS savings penetration (81.2%) are point-in-time inputs.

secondary_chart.label: Historical Mcap / GP (money-market-share proxy)
secondary_chart.subtitle: Market cap ÷ (money-market TVL × Sky share × net GP/supply rate)
secondary_chart.note: GP proxy = official Sky supply × (gross-income yield − savings penetration × savings rate − stUSDS cost rate). Fixed rates.
